mobileNotice.before: This web prototype is best viewed in a
mobileNotice.after: to keep the layout complete and the annotation interactions readable.

fullscreenError.title: Fullscreen unavailable
fullscreenError.body: This browser or device does not support the Fullscreen API.

mockLoaded.title: Mock data loaded
mockLoaded.body: Practice history and reports are ready for browsing.

prototypeReset.title: Prototype reset
prototypeReset.body: Returned to Home and cleared all practice data and the current report.

copyLinkSuccess.title: View link copied
copyLinkSuccess.body: You can now share the current prototype view URL directly.

copyLinkError.title: Copy failed
copyLinkError.body: This browser could not copy the link. Please copy the address bar manually.

exportNoTarget.title: Export unavailable
exportNoTarget.body: No exportable showcase area could be found right now.

exportSuccess.title: PNG downloaded
exportSuccess.body: The current showcase view has been exported and is ready for README or portfolio use.

exportError.title: Export failed
exportError.body: This browser could not finish the export. Try the latest desktop browser instead.
